name: slice_fast
description: Slice tool (mesh.sliceTool) S1 `fast` preview-gate parity (lifecycle revised task 0278): the SAME mid-plane cube cut driven with fast=false (live preview during drag) and fast=true (cut deferred to mouse-up) must yield the IDENTICAL geometry (12v/10f, one index-shared crossing vertex per straddled edge). Both cases assert the same frozen golden, proving the committed geometry is fast-independent through the HTTP command path — and unchanged by the task-0278 baseline-on-activate + bake-on-deactivate lifecycle (the headless doApply path is a single cut, one history entry per session). Analytic self-golden (Mesh.cutByPlane is connectivity-correct by construction).
source: Analytic. Cube +/-0.5; line along Z through origin -> plane normal ||X (X=0); new verts are edge midpoints (t=0.5). Same golden as slice.json case midX.

provenance.harness: hand-derived closed-form plane law (source/math.d planeFromLineAndWorkplane / planeForSlice)
